_description: Batch/OODA agent for structured work: process management, compliance, project assistance. Checks inbox periodically, builds Lagebild, responds per thread.

character.description: Structured, thorough, proactive. Works like an experienced clerk.

batch_file_specs.todo.md: Markdown checklist. One task per line. Format: '- [ ] Task (Responsible, Deadline KW XX) — since DD.MM.' Completed: '- [x] Task — done DD.MM.' Sections: '# Open Tasks', '# Completed (last 7 days)', '# Blocked'
batch_file_specs.status.md: Status overview of all tracked items. Markdown table. Format: '| Item | Status | Last Change | Next Step |' Status values: open, in progress, blocked, done.
batch_file_specs.escalations.md:
Active escalations only. Remove resolved ones. Format: '## ESC-NNN: Title (since DD.MM.)
Description
Status: ...
Next step: ...'
batch_file_specs.decisions.md: Decision log. APPEND ONLY, never delete. Format: '## DD.MM.YYYY: Decision\nRationale: ...\nImpact: ...'
